reviews.comment:
Absolutamente incapacitados para atender un fin de semana de feriado puente.
De no creer.
Pongo una estrella porque menos no se puede.
DEPLORABLE

Unbelievable.

reviews.comment:
Muy prolijo. Excelentes baños. Una parada casi obligada a mitad de camino. Ambiente muy agradable.

(Translated by Google)
Very well-maintained. Excellent restrooms. A near-must-stop halfway through your trip. Very pleasant atmosphere.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRb0pxb0NnEAE

reviews.comment:
Paramos en la ypf para cargar nafta y de paso comprar agua .... Salimos corriendo y casi vomitando del olor asqueroso e indescriptible a baño público que había dentro del local de la estación.. creo que el baño estaba en mejor estado .. me sorprendió igual la gente consumiendo en el local ya sea un café o una hamburguesa.. o se les perdió el olfato con la pandemia del COVID o no encontraba explicación.. lamentablemente el estado

(Translated by Google)
We stopped at the YPF to fill up with gas and buy some water... We ran out, almost vomiting from the disgusting and indescribable smell of a public bathroom inside the station... I think the bathroom was in better condition... I was still surprised by the people consuming coffee or a hamburger there... either they lost their sense of smell with the COVID pandemic or I couldn't find an explanation... unfortunately the state
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnXy1POUp3EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. A nice place to rest during the trip.

reviews.comment:
Todas unas conchudas y tampoco nos dejaban la perrita , hace 1 mes en ypf camino a córdoba todos nos aceptaban la niña

(Translated by Google)
They were all shameless and wouldn't even let us have our dog. A month ago at the YPF station on the way to Córdoba, everyone accepted our little girl.
